methods.description: Process for analyzing GeneChip data to determine differential gene expression using Affymetrix Expression Console and DNA-Chip Analyzer (dChip).

steps.description: Scanned arrays were analyzed first with Affymetrix Expression Console software to obtain Absent/Present calls and to assure that all quality parameters were in the recommended range.
steps.searchable_summary: Use Affymetrix Expression Console to analyze scanned arrays for quality control and Absent/Present calls.

steps.description: Subsequent analysis was carried out with DNA-Chip Analyzer (dChip) 2010. The 6 arrays were normalized to a baseline array with median CEL intensity by applying an Invariant Set Normalization Method.
steps.searchable_summary: Normalize arrays using DNA-Chip Analyzer with Invariant Set Normalization Method.

steps.description: Normalized CEL intensities of the arrays were used to obtain model-based gene expression indices based on a PM (Perfect Match)-only model.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate gene expression indices using PM-only model from normalized CEL intensities.

steps.description: Replicate data (triplicates) for the conditions were weighted gene-wise by using inverse squared standard error as weights.
steps.searchable_summary: Weight replicate data using inverse squared standard error.

steps.description: Genes compared were considered to be differentially expressed if the 90% lower confidence bound of the fold change between experiment and baseline was above 1.3.
steps.searchable_summary: Identify differentially expressed genes using 90% lower confidence bound of fold change.
